## ContentNode.firstBy() method

Return the first typed-field match within this node's subtree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
firstBy<TKey extends keyof TFrontmatter>(key: TKey, value: ContentFieldValue<TFrontmatter, TKey>, options?: NodeFindOptions<TFrontmatter>): ContentNode<TFrontmatter> | null;
```
